creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
Created attachment 166337
The LICENSE is added

Dear Kubilay,
I am not sure if the attachment counts as patch because it is related to /usr/ports/games/taipan/Makefile.
portlint -C reported a missing license information. I took the information from
http://www.gtlib.gatech.edu/pub/Linux/games/textrpg/taipan-0.9.lsm
which claims GPL.

# portlint -C /usr/ports/games/taipan
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

I have just chosen -C because pedantic sounds good.
